prompt: Ultra-realistic lifestyle portrait of a handsome young man with thick, naturally wavy dark hair, light stubble, a sharp jawline, and a warm genuine smile, seated casually on a modern charcoal-gray lounge chair. Soft natural light creates rich contrast, realistic skin texture, detailed facial features, and premium editorial aesthetics.
